prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FPCS-525X3-GRY Product Type: ELECTRONIC_SWITCH Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Moto Tool Foot Pedal Power Tool Control Switch Flexible Shaft Grinder Description: This plug and play varaible speed foot control pedal switch for sewing machines, rotary tools, scroll saws, and flexible shaft grinders. The more you press down on the spring lever pedal the faster the tool will go. Compatible with a wide range of power tools this heavy duty foot switch is a simple add on that will give you better control and feel of your tools. It has a wire length of 72 inches (180cm), a voltage: 110-120V/60Hz, and a capacity of 1.5 AMPS. Max speed 5,000 to 15,000 RPM.

Just press down the foot control and the faster your tool will go. Search Terms: foot pedal control switch flexible shaft grinder power tool rotary carver dead man on off variable speed sewing machine scroll saw Features: - HEAVY-DUTY - Carbon resistance foot control with 3 prong plug for variable speed control of power tools such as rotary grinding tools or power tools - PLUG AND PLAY - Ready to use out of the box. Simply plug your tool into the socket cord and the foot controller power cord into your standard home outlet and you're up and running in less than 1 minute - SPECIFICATIONS - Voltage: 110-120V/60Hz; Capacity: 1.5 AMPS; Power Cord Length: 72 inches; Socket Cord Length: 24 inches - MAX SPEED - 5,000 to 15,000 RPM - UNIVERSAL APPLICATION - Works with all tools; great if you just want to have hands free operation. The more you press down the faster the tool will go === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
